ashwater.name: Ashwater
ashwater.description: Exhaust any number of cards in your Hand.

attack potion.name: Attack Potion
attack potion.description: Choose 1 of 3 random Attack cards to add into your Hand. It's free to play this turn.

beetle juice.name: Beetle Juice
beetle juice.description: Enemy's attacks deal 30% less damage for the next 4 turns.

blessing of the forge.name: Blessing of the Forge
blessing of the forge.description: Upgrade all cards in your Hand for the rest of combat.

blood potion.name: Blood Potion
blood potion.description: Heal for 20% of your Max HP.

bottled potential.name: Bottled Potential
bottled potential.description: Shuffle ALL your cards into your Draw Pile. Draw 5 cards.

clarity extract.name: Clarity Extract
clarity extract.description: Draw 1 card. At the start of your next 3 turns, draw 1 additional card.

colorless potion.name: Colorless Potion
colorless potion.description: Choose 1 of 3 random Colorless cards to add into your Hand. It's free to play this turn.

cosmic concoction.name: Cosmic Concoction
cosmic concoction.description: Add 3 Upgraded Colorless cards into your Hand.

cunning potion.name: Cunning Potion
cunning potion.description: Add 3 Upgraded Shivs into your Hand.

deprecated potion.name: Deprecated Potion
deprecated potion.description: This potion has been removed from the game.

distilled chaos.name: Distilled Chaos
distilled chaos.description: Play the top 3 cards of your Draw Pile.

droplet of precognition.name: Droplet of Precognition
droplet of precognition.description: Choose a card in your Draw Pile and add it into your Hand.

duplicator.name: Duplicator
duplicator.description: This turn, your next card is played an extra time.

entropic brew.name: Entropic Brew
entropic brew.description: Fill all your empty potion slots with random potions.

essence of darkness.name: Essence of Darkness
essence of darkness.description: Channel a Dark for each of your Orb Slots.

fairy in a bottle.name: Fairy in a Bottle
fairy in a bottle.description: When you would die, instead this potion is discarded and you heal to 30% of your Max HP.

flex potion.name: Flex Potion
flex potion.description: Gain 5 Strength. At the end of your turn, lose 5 Strength.

foul potion.name: Foul Potion
foul potion.description: Deal 12 damage to EVERYONE. Can be thrown at the Merchant for {Gold} Gold instead.

gambler's brew.name: Gambler's Brew
gambler's brew.description: Discard any number of cards, then draw that many.

gigantification potion.name: Gigantification Potion
gigantification potion.description: The next Attack you play deals triple damage.

liquid memories.name: Liquid Memories
liquid memories.description: Put a card from your Discard Pile into your Hand. It costs 0  this turn.

orobic acid.name: Orobic Acid
orobic acid.description: Add a random Attack, Skill, and Power into your Hand. They're free to play this turn.

potion of binding.name: Potion of Binding
potion of binding.description: Apply 1 Weak and 1 Vulnerable to ALL enemies.

powdered demise.name: Powdered Demise
powdered demise.description: Enemy loses 9 HP at the end of each of its turns.

power potion.name: Power Potion
power potion.description: Choose 1 of 3 random Power cards to add into your Hand. It's free to play this turn.

radiant tincture.name: Radiant Tincture
radiant tincture.description: Gain . Gain an additional  at the start of your next 3 turns.

shackling potion.name: Shackling Potion
shackling potion.description: ALL enemies lose 7 Strength this turn.

ship in a bottle.name: Ship in a Bottle
ship in a bottle.description: Gain 10 Block. Next turn, gain 10 Block.

skill potion.name: Skill Potion
skill potion.description: Choose 1 of 3 random Skill cards to add into your Hand. It's free to play this turn.

snecko oil.name: Snecko Oil
snecko oil.description: Draw 7 cards. Randomize the cost of cards in your Hand this turn.

soldier's stew.name: Soldier's Stew
soldier's stew.description: All cards containing Strike gain 1 Replay this combat.

speed potion.name: Speed Potion
speed potion.description: Gain 5 Dexterity. At the end of your turn, lose 5 Dexterity.

touch of insanity.name: Touch of Insanity
touch of insanity.description: Choose a card in your Hand. It is free to play this combat.
